daily.today_energy: Your vibe is giving main character energy today. The cosmos wants you to trust your gut—those intuitive hits you're getting? They're legit. Channel that Scorpio intensity into something that actually matters to you.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or single, there's a softness in the air around you rn. If you've been holding back on vulnerability, today's the day to let someone in. Your authenticity is your superpower.
daily.career: Mercury's got your back today—communication flows naturally and ideas hit different. This is your moment to speak up in that meeting or pitch that project you've been sitting on. Your confidence will carry you.
daily.health: Your body's asking for grounding rn. Whether that's a walk, some stretching, or just touching grass, lean into it. Your nervous system will thank you. Rest isn't laziness; it's strategy.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is all about letting go and recalibrating, Scorpio. Venus is stirring your introspective corners, asking you to shed what no longer serves your vibe. Trust the process—transformation looks good on you.
weekly.love: Your emotional landscape is deepening beautifully. If you're coupled up, vulnerability becomes your superpower this week. Single? Someone's noticing your aura. Either way, lead with authenticity and watch connections shift.
weekly.career: Mercury's moving through your sector of ambition, sparking clarity on next moves. Your intuition about projects is sharper than usual—that gut feeling about a direction or opportunity? It's worth exploring. Stay curious.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for rest and intentional movement, not grinding. Think restorative yoga, long walks, or just letting yourself exist without productivity pressure. Your nervous system will thank you for the gentleness.
